---
name: Chore / Refactor / Docs
about: Non-feature work such as refactoring, documentation updates, or maintenance tasks
title: "[CHORE] "
labels: chore
assignees: ""
---

## Task Type
- [ ] Documentation  (README, CONTRIBUTING, inline comments, wiki)
- [ ] Refactor       (structural change with no behavior change)
- [ ] Dependency     (package updates, version pins)
- [ ] Build / CI     (Webpack config, GitHub Actions, linting rules)
- [ ] Style          (formatting, naming conventions)
- [ ] Other: ___
